phases.name: Centralized Path Resolution Module
phases.goal: A single `lib/paths.js` module exists that all other modules can import to resolve any `.planning/` subdirectory path, with milestone-scoping and backward compatibility.

phases.name: lib/ Module Migration
phases.goal: Every lib/ module that constructs `.planning/` subdirectory paths uses `paths.js` instead of hardcoded strings, and all init functions output milestone-scoped paths in their JSON responses.

phases.name: Command & Agent Markdown Migration
phases.goal: All command and agent markdown files reference milestone-scoped paths by consuming them from init context output rather than hardcoding directory strings.

phases.name: Migration Script & Archive Simplification
phases.goal: A `grd-tools migrate-dirs` command exists that moves existing top-level `.planning/` subdirectories to the new hierarchy, milestone completion no longer copies phase directories, and the migration is idempotent.

phases.name: Test Updates, Documentation & Integration Validation
phases.goal: All tests pass against the new directory hierarchy with zero regressions, documentation reflects the new structure, and the full pipeline works end-to-end.
